text.title: Vendor Margin Defense Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals (project length, bleed %, cumulative %, SALES_INVESTMENT tag, iteration count) to suppress / report / alert / pause-clause.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — short or open-ended T&M; use solo-time-tracking-discipline instead

branch.question: candidate flagged but tagged SALES_INVESTMENT or QA_ITERATION?

conclusion.verdict: exclude from bleed; log at full rate then write-off with reason; not an alert

branch.question: any single bleed > 5% OR cumulative > 10% OR realised_margin < 0?

conclusion.verdict: report-only; continue weekly cadence; review next Friday
alert + drafted client conversation within 48h + escalate to pause-clause discussion per solo-late-fee-and-pause-clause-template
alert + drafted client conversation + send CR via solo-change-order-mini-contract; verbal acknowledgements rejected

text.example: duration=8w, fixed-price → applies → SALES tag absent → cumulative=13.55% → threshold_breached → severity=normal → alert + CR.
